name: Apple Cranberry Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cranberries, fresh or frozen -- coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jelly roll pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sugar, butter, eggs, orange peel and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed for 2 to 3 minutes until well mixed.
4. Reduce the speed to low; add the flour, baking soda and salt. Continue beating until well mixed.
5. By hand, stir in the apples, cranberries and nuts. Spread in the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
7. In a small mixing bowl, combine the butter, cream cheese and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed for 1 to 2 minutes until well mixed.
8. Reduce the speed to low. Continue beating, gradually adding the powdered sugar, orange peel and enough milk for desired spreading consistency.
9. Thinly frost the cooled bars; cut into bars.
